name: software-design-workflow
description: Codex skills for turning vague software ideas into scoped design and handoff packages.

interface.shortDescription: Scope, design, plan, and hand off software work.
interface.longDescription: A compact Codex skill pack for converting vague software directions into scoped design packages with quality checks and implementation handoff guidance.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product idea into a scoped design.
Review this design package for handoff readiness.
Help freeze the current target for implementation.
